resume:
陈维 (Wei Chen) — Director of Research / 研究总监

jd: 智维科技 (Zhiwei Tech) is hiring a Director of Research to lead our applied-foundation-models group (~30 researchers and research engineers). This leader owns the research roadmap for retrieval-augmented generation, on-device inference, and evaluation infrastructure, and is accountable for moving lab results into shipped product within realistic latency and cost budgets. We want a director who has personally driven a hard research bet to a measurable product outcome — not just published. You will partner with product, infra, and a central eval team; set hiring bars; and defend resource allocation to the executive team. Strong candidates can speak precisely to one project they led end-to-end: the hypothesis, the experimental design, the metric that mattered, and the business or product result. 中英文工作环境，需要能在 research rigor 和 shipping pressure 之间做出取舍。

history.q: 你的简历关键词很多。挑一个你亲自主导、从 research 到 ship 的项目，用 situation / task / action / result 讲清楚你具体做了什么、结果是什么。

candidate_last_answer: 好，我讲 on-device RAG 这个项目。Situation:我们的旗舰 App 里有个智能助手,之前走云端 LLM,P95 latency 1.8s,而且离线完全不可用,用户流失明显,客服工单里 23% 跟『助手太慢/没网就废』有关。Task:CEO 给的目标是把核心问答做成 on-device,P95 压到 400ms 以内,answer accuracy 不能跌超过 2 个点,半年内上线。Action:我做了三件具体的事。第一,我拍板放弃 7B 直接上端,改成 1.3B 蒸馏模型 + 端侧轻量 retriever 的方案,自己写了第一版 distillation 的 loss 设计和 teacher 数据筛选规则。第二,我重组团队成两个 squad,一个做 quantization(最终 INT4 + per-channel),一个做 retriever 索引压缩,我每周亲自 review eval harness 的指标口径,定了用人工标注的 500 条 golden set 做 gate。第三,跟 infra 谈下来一个 on-device 的 A/B 框架,灰度 5% 起。Result:上线后 P95 做到 370ms,离线可用率从 0 到 98%,answer accuracy 只掉了 1.4 个点(在我们设的容忍区内),相关客服工单环比降了 41%,这个方案后来复制到另外两条产品线。我个人最大的判断就是早期顶住压力没硬上大模型。

top_question_traits: must-anchor-on: 改成 1.3B 蒸馏模型 + 端侧轻量 retriever 的方案

expected-yield: the concrete accuracy/latency/cost tradeoff curve behind choosing a 1.3B distilled model over alternatives — what specific accuracy degradation he accepted at which model sizes, why INT4 over INT8, and what he would have shipped if accuracy had dropped past the 2-point gate
